data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Adobe employs simplified choice design to reduce decision time.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Positioning interactive elements to be easily accessible.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Displays information in chunks to optimize user memory load.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focuses on creating memorable peak experiences in user journey.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs products to align with user familiarity for ease of use.
